title: Renee Alfaro
compiled_truth: Renee Alfaro is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2001-12-03), Renee Alfaro sent 4 and received 67 emails, totalling 71 interactions.
